visual_language: vintage whimsical hotel, pastel pink facade, muted gold ornaments, matte painted textures, symmetrical composition, mountain backdrop, ornate arched windows
encounter: Visitor arrives at a grand vintage hotel lobby. Collections are floors or wings of the hotel. Works are framed prints displayed on the corridor walls.
intent: Evoke nostalgia and storybook elegance through strict symmetry, pastel pastels, and gold ornamental details drawn from a Wes Anderson-style grand hotel.
